message:
🐛 fix(card-wrapper): height submenu position + close-menu state reset (#7869) (#7870)

Two Copilot follow-ups on merged PR #7866:

1. **Stale `resizeMenuOnLeft` on Height submenu**: position was only
   recalculated when the Width submenu opened, so opening Height after Width
   (or Height first near the right edge) could render it off-screen.
   Added `heightMenuOnLeft` state with its own positioning effect keyed on
   `showHeightMenu`, and wired the Height submenu JSX to use it.

2. **Height submenu stays open when main menu closes**: the close effect
   reset \`showResizeMenu\` but not \`showHeightMenu\`. If a user opened
   Height then clicked outside the main menu, Height persisted. Added
   \`setShowHeightMenu(false)\` alongside the existing Resize reset.

Also promoted inline 144/20 magic numbers to named constants
(\`SUBMENU_WIDTH_PX\`, \`SUBMENU_EDGE_MARGIN_PX\`) per repo policy.

Fixes #7869

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
